case_payload.summary: A system minimally deforms a prior path distribution to satisfy new boundary constraints, preserving prior dynamics as much as possible.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The path distribution is minimally reweighted under new constraints without summoning impossible routes.

why: The case explicitly tests minimal path reweighting under constraints.
It confirms the absence of impossible route summoning, aligning with the claim.
The observed outcome and ground truth both support a valid Schrodinger bridge operation.
